summary: Comprehensive testing of FPS Calculator with expanded 81-game database and searchable category-grouped game dropdown. All 28 backend tests pass. Frontend fully functional with new game selector, category grouping, search filtering, and product cards displaying 'Check price on Amazon' buttons without hardcoded prices.
critical_code_review_comments: All 81 games properly categorized across 10 categories
games_by_category and game_categories correctly returned by /api/hardware
Product cards have no price field - only Amazon affiliate links with 'Check price on Amazon' button
New games (Helldivers 2, Microsoft Flight Simulator, Baldur's Gate 3) all calculate correctly

features_verified.game_categories_10: PASS - 10 categories: Competitive/Esports, Open World/AAA, Action RPG, Racing, Sandbox/Creative, Strategy, Simulation, Horror/Survival, MMO, Multiplayer/Co-op
features_verified.games_by_category: PASS - All categories populated with games
features_verified.game_dropdown_search: PASS - Search input filters games across categories
features_verified.game_dropdown_categories: PASS - Category headers with colored dots and game counts displayed
features_verified.game_selection_closes_dropdown: PASS - Selecting game updates form and closes dropdown
features_verified.microsoft_flight_simulator_4k: PASS - 88/63/51/41 FPS at 4K with top hardware (demanding as expected)
features_verified.fortnite_performance_mode: PASS - Performance quality preset available for Fortnite
features_verified.product_cards_no_price: PASS - No price displayed in cards, only 'Check price on Amazon' button
features_verified.product_cards_amazon_links: PASS - All cards have Amazon affiliate links with fpscalc-20 tag
features_verified.share_build_link: PASS - Copy Share Link button functional

context_for_next_testing_agent: 81 games expanded from 16, grouped into 10 categories. New searchable game dropdown (GameSelector.jsx) replaces plain Select. Product cards now show 'Check price on Amazon' instead of hardcoded prices. All backend APIs functional. Frontend game selector uses data-testid='game-select' for trigger, data-testid='game-search-input' for search, data-testid='game-option-{game-name}' for options. Backend URL: https://fps-calculator-7.preview.emergentagent.com
